Variables.Name: CurrentPositionOnRail
Variables.Description: Defines current position of the mount point along the rail, in terms of normalized distance from the beginning of the rail.

Variables.Name: TransformComponent
Variables.Description: Root component to give the whole actor a transform.

Variables.Name: RailSplineComponent
Variables.Description: Spline component to define the rail path.

Variables.Name: RailCameraMount
Variables.Description: Component to define the attach point for cameras. Moves along the rail.
